description_long: This is a cylindrical, metal trash bin with a domed, removable lid and vertical ribbed reinforcements along its body. The bin is a dark gray color with a slightly weathered, matte finish, suggesting it is made from galvanized steel. Two external, side-mounted handles are attached near the top for easy lifting, and a rectangular handle is present on the top of the lid for removal. The lid fits snugly over the rim, providing a secure closure to contain waste and odors. There are no visible wheels or labeling, and the bin appears robust and suitable for outdoor urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or alleys. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and ease of handling.
description: A cylindrical, dark gray metal trash bin with a domed removable lid, ribbed sides, and external handles for lifting. The surface is matte and slightly weathered, with no visible labeling or wheels.
description_view_0: The bin is shown with its domed lid and a top-mounted rectangular handle visible, with one side-mounted handle partially seen.
description_view_1: This view highlights one of the external, side-mounted handles and the rectangular handle on the lid, showing the ribbed body in detail.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the domed lid and top handle are visible, with the opposite side-mounted handle partially seen.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, focusing on the other side-mounted handle and the top handle, with clear ribbing on the body.
attribute_handle_design: external, side-mounted handles and top-mounted lid handle
